title: Sampling, Inference, Regression, and Causal Limits · Decision Notebook: Regression Diagnostics
summary: Evaluate a program change from sampled observational and experimental evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int regression diagnostics increment in an inference and limitations brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect residuals, leverage, confounding, and extrapolation before regression claims.
Define hypotheses, errors, significance, effect size, and decision limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
